growth_records.medium: defined P-rich/P-limited minimal medium (Tanner 2007) with glucose as sole organic C
growth_records.cite: Scott, J Thad et al. Variable Stoichiometry and Homeostatic Regulation of Bacterial Biomass Elemental Composition. Frontiers in Microbiology (2012). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2012.00042. [PMC3283892]
growth_records.snippet: Chemostat dilution rates were set at 25% mu_max for each isolate... Cellulomonas cellulans | Dilution rate (h-1) 0.06 (Table 1).
growth_records.notes: Chemostat steady-state => mu = D = 0.06 h-1 (25% mu_max => mu_max ~0.24 h-1). doubling_time = 0.693/0.06 = 11.55 h. No uptake/secretion rates measured (only biomass C, P and C:P_B). Medium recipe cited to Tanner (2007); glucose 27 mM C constant C source. pH not reported. TER(C:P)=138; H' 1.66 (P-sufficient) / 3.74 (P-deficient).
